heading: Designated persons list for particularly severe violations of religious freedom
label: 6473a Designated persons list for particularly severe violations of religious freedom

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of State, in coordination with the Ambassador at Large and in consultation with relevant government and nongovernment experts, shall establish and maintain a list of foreign individuals to whom a consular post has denied a visa on the grounds of particularly severe violations of religious freedom under , or who are subject to financial sanctions or other measures for particularly severe violations of freedom religion.section 1182(a)(2)(G) of title 8

children.heading: Reference
children.label: 2 Reference
children.text: The list required under paragraph (1) shall be known as the “Designated Persons List for Particularly Severe Violations of Religious Freedom”.

children.label: A
children.text: the name of the individual and a description of the particularly severe violation of religious freedom committed by the individual;

children.label: B
children.text: the name of the country or other location in which such violation took place; and

children.label: C
children.text: a description of the actions taken pursuant to this chapter or any other Act or Executive order in response to such violation.

children.label: A
children.text: the initial report required under paragraph (1) not later than 180 days after ; andDecember 16, 2016

children.label: B
children.text: updates to the report every 180 days thereafter and as new information becomes available.

children.heading: Form
children.label: 3 Form
children.text: The report required under paragraph (1) should be submitted in unclassified form but may contain a classified annex.

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate;

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate;

children.label: D
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives;

children.label: E
children.text: the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: F
children.text: the Committee on Financial Services of the House of Representatives.
